orchestrator-message-loop.rule: Token events are emitted when streaming chunks arrive from the model provider. The orchestrator must emit token events inside the streaming chunk iterator, not after the full response.

task-tool-response.rule: stream_url is added to the task creation response only when input.stream === true. When stream is false or omitted, stream_url must NOT appear in the response.

sse-protocol.rule:
SSE response must set Content-Type: text/event-stream and Cache-Control: no-cache. Each event: 'event: <type>
data: <JSON>

'. Keep-alive: ': ping

' every 15 seconds.
